content: Io sapevo che Tom era un insegnante di francese a Boston, quindi non ho creduto a Mary quando mi ha detto che era un tassista a Chicago.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I knew Tom was a French teacher in Boston, so I didn't believe Mary when she told me Tom was a taxi driver in Chicago
eng:I knew Tom was a French teacher in Boston, so I didn't believe Mary when she told me he was a taxi driver in Chicago
